content.query:
SELECT      DISTINCT MM.ITNO
,           ITDS
,           MM.GRP2
,           MM.GRWE
,           MP.PACT as each_pck
,           MP.PACL as each_L
,           MP.PACW as each_w
,           MP.PACH as each_h
,           Mt.D1QT as each_qty
,           MP2.PACT as case_pck
,           MP2.PACL as case_L
,           MP2.PACW as case_w
,           MP2.PACH as case_h
,           Mt2.D1QT as case_qty
,           MP3.PACT as pallet_pck
,           MP3.PACL as pallet_L
,           MP3.PACW as pallet_w
,           MP3.PACH as pallet_h
,           Mt3.D1QT as pallet_qty
,           SUM([Sales Amt])
FROM        M3.MITMAS MM
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPACIT MT ON MM.ITNO = MT.ITNO AND MT.PACT LIKE 'E%' AND PACT <>'E00000'
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITPAC MP ON MT.PACT = MP.PACT
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPACIT MT2 ON MM.ITNO = MT2.ITNO AND MT2.PACT LIKE 'C%'
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITPAC MP2 ON MT2.PACT = MP2.PACT
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPACIT MT3 ON MM.ITNO = MT3.ITNO AND MT3.PACT LIKE 'P%'
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITPAC MP3 ON MT3.PACT = MP3.PACT
LEFT JOIN   a_SalesData SD on MM.ITNO = SD.[Part ID - Actual] AND Date >= GETDATE() - 365 AND [Sales Amt] > 0
GROUP BY    MM.ITNO
,           ITDS
,           MM.GRP2
,           MM.GRWE
,           MP.PACT
,           mp.PACL
,           mp.PACW
,           mp.PACH
,           mt.D1QT
,           mp2.PACT
,           mp2.PACL
,           mp2.PACW
,           mp2.PACH
,           mt2.D1QT
,           mp3.PACT
,           mp3.PACL
,           mp3.PACW
,           mp3.PACH
,           mt3.D1QT
